offer: For law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month, poor compliance monitoring causes legal penalties. We provide compliance alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to monitor contract compliance effectively, leading to potential legal penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking help
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Community forums where law firms share tools
try_it: Let users try dashboard for compliance metrics and manual entry.
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
